Hi! I do not think we have met. I am Tom, I live in the blue house across the street.
Hi Tom, nice to meet you! I am Ana Paula. I am a doctor from Brazil, and I moved here last year.
Welcome to the neighborhood! I am a history teacher, so I love these dinners. What do you do these days?
Right now, I am studying for my medical exams. Every morning I study English, because I want to do research here.
That is impressive. I am learning Portuguese myself, my wife is from Lisbon. Do you have any hobbies?
Yes! I watch documentaries, and on weekends I walk my two Border Collies in the park.
Hi, I am Ana Paula. Nice to meet you.
I am a doctor from Brazil, and I live here now.
Right now, I am studying to work as a doctor here.
On weekends, I walk my dogs and watch documentaries.
It was great to talk. Let us meet again soon.

Good afternoon, everyone, and welcome to our free walking tour of the old town. My name is Daniel, and I am your guide today. Right now, the sun is out, so it is a perfect afternoon to explore. We start here at the main square, and then we walk down to the river. On this tour, I tell you the story of each old building. The whole walk takes about ninety minutes. Please stay together, ask me anything, and enjoy your afternoon with us.

Hi Ana Paula, it is Sarah! I hope you are having a good week. Listen, this Saturday I am visiting the new history museum downtown, and I would love for you to come with me. They have a wonderful documentary about the city, and afterwards we can walk around the park with your dogs. I am free all afternoon, so we are not in a hurry. Call me back when you get this, and let me know if you can join. Talk soon. Bye!

Say hello and introduce yourself with your name. Tell the person where you are from and what you do. Talk about your daily routine and what you are doing these days. Ask the other person a question about their life. Say it was nice to talk and agree to meet again.
